role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of text and remained within domain constraints.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, vegetation, and climate cues as declared.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed plant species (Betula pendula) and forest composition.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed road width, surface quality, and shoulder types.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Analyzed utility pole styles and camera generation artifacts.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified the ground truth (Russia) by leveraging the meta-agent's analysis of utility poles and road infrastructure to break the tie between visually similar Eastern European candidates. The reasoning was consistent and well-supported by the available visual evidence.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of birch forests and overcast skies match the image perfectly.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Correctly identified Silver Birch characteristics visible in the image.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Accurately described the cracked asphalt and dirt shoulders.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Utility pole descriptions align with the visible infrastructure.
